file_insights.purpose: Record CI workflow audit findings for cloud compatibility
file_insights.content_summary: Comprehensive audit report of two GitHub Actions workflows (repo-health.yml and release.yml) with detailed findings for each

patterns_discovered.significance: Both workflows rely only on GitHub's cloud infrastructure, no self-hosted runners required
All dependencies installed via established methods (dtolnay actions, brew, pre-installed tools) - cloud-compatible
Health checks and release builds in separate workflows with distinct purposes and tools
No references to 'bop serve' or custom internal services that would block cloud deployment

approach_outcome.methodology: Document-based audit of two existing GitHub Actions workflows
approach_outcome.completeness: Comprehensive - all dependencies, runners, and jobs analyzed

recommendations.rationale: Both workflows are already cloud-compatible and ready for production deployment
Audit report created and can serve as reference for future CI/CD decisions

recommendations.action: Monitor for cloud compatibility during workflow updates
recommendations.rationale: Ensure any future workflow modifications maintain cloud compatibility
